# function: op_status_code_check

The HTTP status code comparison operation. The `operator` parameter can be one of `equals`, `not_equal`, `less_than`, `greater_than`, `always`, or `never`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_status_code_check("greater_than", 199)
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_status_code_check(operator string, value number) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `operator` (String) The comparison operator. Can be one of `equals`, `not_equal`, `less_than`, `greater_than`, `always`, or `never`.
1. `value` (Number) The HTTP status code to compare against.
